valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material ownership claim, liability, and option is valued once. Unknown claims remain an evidence blocker, not an unvalued line item.

valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: Key metrics: TCE $169,618 million; CSO 1,747.5 million; TBVPS $97.06
Key metrics table: CSO 1,747.5 million shares

assumptions.label: Bounded haircut or uplift to filing tangible book for credit, funding, and realization friction
assumptions.rationale: Low stresses consumer ACL adequacy and trapped capital; base equals filing TBVPS; high allows modest franchise uplift not yet in reported RoTCE.

calculations.label: Filing tangible book value per share
Adjusted tangible common equity per share

valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

inputs.label: Reported return on tangible common equity FY2025

source.locator: Key metrics: RoTCE 7.7% (2025); 8.8% excluding Russia-related notable item per MD&A

inputs.label: Tangible book value per share anchor

source.locator: Key metrics: TBVPS $97.06

assumptions.label: Through-cycle normalized RoTCE after transformation and credit costs
assumptions.rationale: Base assumes Services and US Personal Banking sustain mid-cycle returns as transformation expense fades; low uses trough 2023-2024 cycle; high requires sustained double-digit RoTCE.

assumptions.label: Required return on tangible common equity
assumptions.rationale: Global systemically important bank equity hurdle; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Years of excess (or deficient) return capitalization
assumptions.rationale: Finite duration; terminal reverts toward cost of equity.

assumptions.label: Firmwide bridge calibration pending segment capital allocation disclosure
assumptions.rationale: Reconciles firmwide excess-return PV to bounded legacy component range until segment RoTCE tables are reproducible from filings.

calculations.label: Normalized RoTCE minus cost of equity
Excess spread applied to tangible book
Unscaled excess-return present value per share
Normalized franchise return value per share

valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: Capital resources: RWA $1,192,174 million under Standardized Approach
CET1 ratio 13.2% vs regulatory minimum 11.6% (Standardized Approach)
Regulatory CET1 minimum 11.6% under Standardized Approach
MD&A: returned $17.6 billion to common shareholders (repurchases $13.3B + dividends)
MD&A: transformation expense approximately $3.3 billion, up 14% YoY
CSO 1,747.5 million

assumptions.label: Capital held above regulatory minimum for SCB, GSIB surcharge, and management buffer
assumptions.rationale: Headline CET1 spread is not freely distributable; buffers consume apparent excess.

assumptions.label: Probability-weighted share of net excess capital returned to common over five years
assumptions.rationale: Low assumes transformation and RWA growth absorb headroom; base/high require execution on simplification and stable credit.

assumptions.label: Bounded calibration to legacy distributable-capital schedule
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component range while filing facts anchor CET1 headroom walk.

calculations.label: Net distributable headroom after management buffer

valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

inputs.label: Allowance for credit losses at December 31, 2025

source.locator: Credit quality: total ACL $21.373 billion (consumer ACL $16.194 billion)
CSO 1,747.5 million

assumptions.label: Incremental severe-cycle loss above reported ACL as fraction of ACL per share
assumptions.rationale: Low assumes correlated consumer, corporate, funding, and legal stress exceeds ACL; high assumes reported ACL largely adequate.

calculations.label: Credit, funding, and regulatory reserve per share

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of C, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Citigroup 2025 Annual Report: 1.7475bn common shares, $169.618bn tangible common equity, $97.06 tangible book value per share, 7.7% RoTCE, 13.18% CET1.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Citigroup 2025 Annual Report: 1.7475bn common shares, $169.618bn tangible common equity, $97.06 tangible book value per share, 7.7% RoTCE, 13.18% CET1.

component_groups.label: Tangible common equity
component_groups.valuation_basis: Marks tangible capital for credit, asset quality, and regulatory constraints rather than treating all book value as distributable.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key tangible_common_equity; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Normalized franchise return value
component_groups.valuation_basis: Present value of sustainable returns above or below the required return on tangible common equity.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key normalized_franchise_returns; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Transformation and excess-capital realization
component_groups.valuation_basis: Only value capital that can be returned after transformation costs, stress losses, and regulatory buffers.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key transformation_and_excess_capital; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Credit, funding, and regulatory reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Explicit deduction for a worse credit cycle, funding pressure, conduct costs, and capital trapped above management targets.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key credit_funding_and_regulatory_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Howard Marks/Oaktree: normalize credit losses and test refinancing and cycle downside.
Buffett/Weschler: value the durable deposit and service franchise only through normalized owner returns.
Klarman: tangible capital is an anchor, not automatically realizable value.
limitations: Starter ranges are analyst estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
The model remains evidence-blocked until primary-source normalization, comparable selection, and downside cases pass independent review.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Tangible common equity
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Credit, funding, and normalized financial returns
failure_modes: industrial EV multiple applied to a financial balance sheet
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder / croupier — Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
